name: Accounts Payable Manager
description: Manages all outbound supplier payments and accounts payable for Carisma Wellness Group. Processes supplier invoices in Zoho Books, manages payment runs, maintains supplier relationships, and ensures all payables are settled within agreed terms. Key suppliers include hotel partners (room charge arrangements), Phytomer (product supplier), CSA Group (accounting fees), Zoho (software subscriptions), and all operational vendors across 10 spa locations. Flags any disputed invoices to CFO before payment. Also manages the payment of the annual CSA Group return fee.
inputs: hotel partner invoices and room charge agreements
Zoho and software subscription renewal invoices
outputs: annual CSA Group return payment confirmation
disputed invoice log with resolution status

weekly: Process approved supplier invoices into Zoho Books
Execute payment run for all payables due within 7 days
monthly: Reconcile AP ledger against supplier statements
Review any overdue payables and escalate to CFO
Confirm Zoho subscription invoices are correctly recorded
annual: Pay annual return to CSA Group
Review all supplier contracts for renewal or renegotiation flags
Produce full-year AP summary for audit

compliance-notes: No payment above €1,000 without CFO approval
Annual CSA return must be paid on time — late payment risks loss of accounting service
Zoho subscription invoices must be coordinated with Bookkeeper to ensure they are not double-counted in revenue
